desc: AgentFM is a peer-to-peer network that turns everyday computers into a decentralized AI supercomputer. AgentFM lets you run massive AI workloads directly acros…
descFull: AgentFM is a peer-to-peer network that turns everyday computers into a decentralized AI supercomputer. AgentFM lets you run massive AI workloads directly across a global mesh of idle CPUs and GPUs.
